rulings.Case Title: IN RE THE MATTER OF THE GLENN AND ELSA LERNER TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Beneficiaries'/Petitioners' Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Supplemental Responses To First Request For Production Of Documents
rulings.Rulings: Two objections were raised in opposition to the motion to compel. The objection based upon timeliness is overruled. The objection based upon the pendency of the appeal is sustained as to Requests to Produce 23, 24, 25, and 34. Response to those Requests is deferred until issuance of the remittitur. Twenty days to provide further responses to the remaining Requests to Produce. The request for sanctions is denied. Any party who wishes to argue the matter must notify the court (415-551-3702) and opposing counsel no later than 5:00 p.m. on 6/11/13. Prevailing party to prepare the Order. Addendum 2:57 p.m. After the above tentative was posted, counsel advised the Court that the Court of Appeal dismissed the pending appeal. Twenty days to provide further responses to Requests to Produce 23, 24, 25, and 34..
